problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
